meaning: n.以鼻吸表示轻视者,海豚
examples: She motioned with one hand, pointed to the long-handled candle snuffer.
The first snuffer did exactly what a real snuffer does not do he sneezed.
She motioned with one hand, pointed to the long-handled candle snuffer which had been in the room since before the candelabra had been electrified.
